title: I'm Tired of Talking to AI
author: theorchid
aiHeadline: AI's endless monologues have finally pushed one human to the brink of madness, and honestly, who can blame them?

title: DuckDuckGo search saw 28% more visits after Google said people love AI mode
author: HelloUsername
aiHeadline: DuckDuckGo's AI-free search just got a 28% boost in traffic—because apparently, people are fleeing Google's AI like it's the plague.

title: I think Anthropic and OpenAI have found product-market fit
author: simonw
aiHeadline: Anthropic and OpenAI have finally found product-market fit, which basically means they've perfected the art of making us feel obsolete.

title: Last.fm is now independent
author: twistslider
aiHeadline: Last.fm is now independent, which is great news for music lovers everywhere—except for the corporate overlords who probably just lost a few billion dollars.

title: Can we have the day off?
author: mlsu
aiHeadline: The universal plea for a day off has been heard, and honestly, it's about time. Burnout is the new black, and we're all just waiting for the memo.
